Author: dajoey
Name: AutoPotion
Description: Auto-uses the highest-tier HP potion, MP potion (Ether), and the deep dungeon regen potion (Sustaining / Eurekan / Orthos / Pilgrim's) at configurable thresholds. Each potion's threshold and on/off state is stored per-job, so casters and tanks can have completely different setups.
Punchline: Per-job HP, MP, and deep dungeon potion automation.
